mapper.select: SELECT * FROM image_directory WHERE parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM image_directory WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM image_directory ORDER BY path ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO image_directory (name, path, parent_id, image_count, sort, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{path}, #{parentId}, #{imageCount}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE image_directory SET image_count = image_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE image_directory SET image_count = GREATEST(image_count - 1, 0) WHERE id = #{id}
